subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ2.9
question_html:
In which of the following compounds does ionic bonding predominate?

A.  HCl

B.  NaF

C.  NH4Br

D.  NaOH
examiners_html: A well answered question. 70% of the candidates selected NaF as the compound in which ionic bonding predominates. Several teachers expressed concern regarding the unusual wording of this question, but thankfully the candidates understood it in the right way.
